message:
refactor(types): remove unnecessary unwraps in nancummax/nancummin

Refactored to extract the computed value into a local variable before
assigning to `running`, eliminating .unwrap() calls that were safe
but inelegant. The unwraps were technically unreachable (we always
set `running = Some(...)` immediately before), but this pattern is
clearer and avoids any potential for confusion during code review.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
